verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I never want anything in my life To take your place, I never want to live by any other Grace,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My longing and my hearth Desire Is to seek your face oh Lord, I long to be a friend of God,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I love you day and night, I love you all my life, I love you Lord, Hearth and soul, I long to be a friend of God
